Order Vacating Sentence including Fines and Fees collected shall be refunded in full to the Defendant

The judgment is reversed. The matter is remanded with directions to the trial court to vacate the order denying Prince's motion to suppress and enter a new order granting the motion and to permit Prince to withdraw his guilty plea.
